description: A durable node in the authoritative GitHub Flavored Markdown syntax graph. Structural children are linked by parent_id and order_key; text-bearing leaves embed their inline AST.

id.description: Stable node primary key. The document root is 'root'; all other nodes are UUIDv7 strings.

order_key.description: Sibling position. Equal keys are legal and are deterministically ordered by id.

payload.description: Kind-specific semantic content. Inline arrays use a closed plugin-owned GFM DTO and may contain embedded stable ids for non-text atoms.

format.description: Kind-specific, render-effective Markdown spelling choices. It is authoritative state, not derived metadata or retained source bytes.
